action.command:
echo 'Checking checkpoint and predict.py exist' && ls checkpoints/lora/epoch_2/ && python -c "
import json, re

def parse_model_output(text, image_width, image_height):
    text = text.strip()
    m = re.search(r'<\|box_start\|>\((\d+),\s*(\d+)\),\((\d+),\s*(\d+)\)<\|box_end\|>', text)
    if m:
        x1, y1, x2, y2 = int(m.group(1)), int(m.group(2)), int(m.group(3)), int(m.group(4))
        x1 = int(x1 * image_width / 1000)
        y1 = int(y1 * image_height / 1000)
        x2 = int(x2 * image_width / 1000)
        y2 = int(y2 * image_height / 1000)
        return ('bbox', [x1, y1, x2, y2])
    return None

# Test
result = parse_model_output('<|box_start|>(100,200),(300,400)<|box_end|>', 1920, 1080)
print('bbox test:', result)
result = parse_model_output('<|point_start|>(500,500)<|point_end|>', 1920, 1080)
print('point test:', result)
print('Parser OK')
"
